title: Morgan, Kishbaugh scratch as day two of Iron Dog gets underway
summary: Veterans Mike Morgan and Bradley Kishbaugh have scratched from the 2026 Iron Dog snowmachine race. The partners encountered trouble on the trail around mile 240 after Kishbaugh took at least two collisions with tree stumps. The team spent precious hours working on a temporary fix for the sled before...

title: AST DWLR: Fairbanks [AK26014157]
summary: On February 15, 2026, Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle in Fairbanks after observing multiple traffic violations. The driver was identified as James Reichmann. A records check confirmed that Reichmann was operating the vehicle while still within an active revocation period and that he had previously been informed of his revoked status. During the contact, Reichmann told Troopers he did not believe Driving While License Revoked was a legitimate offense and stated he would continue to drive despite the revocation. Reichmann was subsequently arrested for Driving While License Revoked and transported to Fairbanks Correctional Center.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

entities.address_detail: Reichmann was operating the vehicle while still within an active revocation period and that he had previously been informed of his revoked status

title: Gubernatorial race attracts 14 candidates
